overall.description: A first-person walk through a flooded desert highway during a heavy rainstorm, rendered in a game engine. The camera moves steadily forward through knee-deep water on a desolate road, passing utility poles and approaching a billboard indicating 'Night City' while a fog-obscured urban skyline looms in the distant background.

scene_state.functional_zone: flooded desert highway with utility infrastructure

agents.ego_description: wading steadily forward through knee-deep flood water on the highway

entered.detail: water-covered highway surface with visible potholes and debris
tall wooden utility pole with electrical transformer and cross-arms
multiple electrical wires spanning across the road
large highway billboard visible through the rain and fog
hazy desert mountains in the distant background
sparse desert vegetation scattered along the roadside

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a desolate flooded highway during a heavy downpour. The camera moves forward through the water, approaching a utility pole on the right while a distant billboard and mountain range remain visible through the hazy rain. Sparse Joshua trees dot the desert landscape on the sides of the road.

scene_state.functional_zone: open flooded highway with distant urban skyline

events.description: passes the utility pole structure, which moves out of view behind the camera

agents.ego_description: continuing forward through the flooded road, water splashing with each step

entered.detail: small roadside sign partially visible through the rain on the left shoulder

segments.scene_description: Having passed the utility pole, the camera continues along the open highway. The billboard grows larger in the center of the frame while a fog-obscured city skyline becomes faintly visible on the right horizon. A road sign appears briefly on the left side of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway approach to Night City billboard

events.description: billboard text becomes legible as 'NIGHT CITY 1.2' as camera approaches

agents.ego_description: approaching the large billboard while wading through deeper sections of flooded road

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the camera approaching the large highway billboard, which shifts to the right side of the frame as it nears. The text 'NIGHT CITY 1.2' becomes clearly readable on the billboard face. The flooded road continues ahead with scattered rocks and debris visible in the water, while the distant city skyline remains visible through the heavy rain.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement along a desolate flooded highway that gradually reveals a distant urban skyline through a heavy rainstorm. It begins by wading through knee-deep water past sparse Joshua trees and a utility pole, with a hazy mountain range visible in the distance. As the camera advances, the open road expands and a road sign flashes by on the left, while a fog-obscured city skyline begins to emerge faintly on the right horizon. The scene then shifts as a large highway billboard grows in scale and moves toward the right side of the frame, eventually revealing the clear text Night City 1.2. Finally, the camera continues past the sign over water scattered with rocks and debris, keeping the distant city silhouette framed against the relentless downpour.
